all.en: This code of conduct sets the minimum expectations for all approved suppliers.
all.zh: 本行為準則訂定所有核准供應商須遵循的最低期望。

all.en: It applies to every tier of our global supply chain without exception.
all.zh: 本準則無例外適用於全球供應鏈的每一層級。

all.en: Suppliers must comply with all applicable laws in the countries where they operate.
all.zh: 供應商須遵守其營運所在地的所有適用法律。

all.en: Where this code exceeds local law, the higher standard shall apply.
all.zh: 本準則高於當地法律之處，應適用較嚴格的標準。

all.en: Forced or involuntary labor of any kind is strictly prohibited.
all.zh: 任何形式的強迫或非自願勞動均嚴格禁止。

all.en: The minimum working age must meet or exceed local regulations.
all.zh: 最低工作年齡須達到或超越當地法規規定。

all.en: Working hours and rest days must follow national labor standards.
all.zh: 工作時數與休假日須遵循國家勞動標準。

all.en: Wages and benefits must be paid accurately and on time every cycle.
all.zh: 薪資與福利每期須準確且按時發放。

all.en: Suppliers shall provide a safe and healthy work environment for all employees.
all.zh: 供應商應為所有員工提供安全與健康的工作環境。

all.en: Personal protective equipment must be supplied free of charge where required.
all.zh: 凡屬必要之個人防護裝備須免費提供。

all.en: Discrimination based on race, gender, religion, or age is not tolerated.
all.zh: 基於種族、性別、宗教或年齡的歧視一律不容忍。

all.en: Freedom of association and collective bargaining must be respected.
all.zh: 結社自由與集體協商權利必須受到尊重。

all.en: Bribery, kickbacks, and any form of corruption are strictly forbidden.
all.zh: 賄賂、回扣及任何形式的貪腐均嚴格禁止。

all.en: Gifts to our employees must not exceed reasonable business courtesy levels.
all.zh: 贈予本公司員工的禮品不得超出合理商務禮儀範圍。

all.en: Confidential information shared with suppliers must be protected at all times.
all.zh: 與供應商分享的機密資訊須隨時受到保護。

all.en: Intellectual property rights of all parties must be fully respected.
all.zh: 所有相關方的智慧財產權須受到完整尊重。

all.en: Suppliers must implement environmental management aligned with ISO fourteen thousand one.
all.zh: 供應商須依據 ISO 14001 推行環境管理。

all.en: Greenhouse gas emissions should be measured and reduced wherever feasible.
all.zh: 溫室氣體排放應於可行範圍內進行量測與減量。

all.en: Conflict minerals must be sourced through fully traceable channels.
all.zh: 衝突礦產須透過完全可追溯的管道採購。

all.en: Subcontractors and lower tier suppliers must adhere to equivalent standards.
all.zh: 次承包商及下游供應商須遵循同等標準。

all.en: Suppliers must allow audits with reasonable advance notice.
all.zh: 供應商須於合理事前通知下接受稽核。

all.en: Identified gaps shall be addressed through agreed corrective action plans.
all.zh: 已識別之落差應透過議定的矯正措施計畫處理。

all.en: Suspected violations may be reported anonymously through our ethics hotline.
all.zh: 疑似違反事項可透過倫理專線匿名通報。

all.en: Non compliance may result in suspension or termination of the supplier relationship.
all.zh: 不符規定可能導致暫停或終止供應商合作關係。

all.en: Acceptance of this code is required before any purchase order may be issued.
all.zh: 於核發任何採購訂單前須先接受本準則。

all.en: Annual self assessments must be submitted by each supplier before the end of June.
all.zh: 各供應商須於六月底前提交年度自評。

all.en: Site visits will be coordinated jointly with regional procurement managers.
all.zh: 現場訪查將與區域採購經理共同協調安排。

all.en: Capacity building support is offered to suppliers willing to improve their practices.
all.zh: 對願意改善作為的供應商提供能力建構支援。

all.en: Recognition is given to suppliers that consistently exceed the required standards.
all.zh: 持續超越要求標準的供應商將獲表揚。

all.en: All audit findings are tracked in a centralized supplier governance platform.
all.zh: 所有稽核發現均於集中式供應商治理平台追蹤。

all.en: Continuous improvement is expected rather than mere baseline compliance.
all.zh: 我們期望的是持續改善，而非僅止於最低合規。

all.en: Training materials in multiple languages are available on our supplier portal.
all.zh: 供應商入口網站提供多語訓練教材。

all.en: Suppliers are encouraged to share innovative ideas for joint sustainability projects.
all.zh: 鼓勵供應商分享共同永續專案的創新構想。

all.en: This code will be reviewed every two years to reflect evolving best practices.
all.zh: 本準則每兩年檢討一次，以反映演進的最佳實務。

all.en: We value long term partnerships built on mutual trust and shared accountability.
all.zh: 我們珍視奠基於互信與共同責任的長期合作關係。
